decision: No current evidence bundle contains an exact canonical sport outcome, a point-in-time model probability, and a same-time executable two-sided quote with depth, pause state, and venue-rule snapshot.

polymarket_forward_capture_cutoff.scope: sealed local manifests through hour=15; later or open segments excluded
polymarket_forward_capture_cutoff.interpretation: Raw native market discovery is not a canonical game join. best_bid_ask omits depth, and the available full books are not two-sided executable observations.

nfl.game_state_evidence: X-11 has a real 2015-2025 nflverse walk-forward POC and replay evidence, but only aggregate artifacts and hashes are retained; no joinable ModelOutputV1 rows are present.
nfl.market_evidence: Four 2023-01-01 native NFL conditions and 17 fills are frozen, but fills are not L2, have no local receive time, and have no executable bid/ask depth.
required_next_evidence: materialized PIT ModelOutputV1 rows for the exact NFL games and outcomes
canonical native game and condition and outcome assertions
same-time two-sided L2 with local receive time and positive depth
PIT metadata and venue-rule snapshots

soccer.game_state_evidence: X-12 is a 2015-2016 StatsBomb POC; it has no point-in-time market prior and no joinable ModelOutputV1 rows.
soccer.market_evidence: The forward capture contains unnormalized native sports markets, but no live soccer game-state stream or canonical game-condition assertions exist.
required_next_evidence: same-game live or historical PIT soccer state observations
materialized outcome-aligned ModelOutputV1 rows
canonical game and condition and outcome assertions
two-sided executable quotes with local receive time, depth, pause state, and PIT rules

nba.game_state_evidence: The current X-06 fixture is synthetic contract validation only; formal empirical NBA output is blocked on licensed play-by-play rights.
nba.market_evidence: PMXT has a 24-object 2026-05-28 preflight and one documented native NBA condition candidate, but the day is not reconstructed and no canonical MarketMetadataSnapshotV0 exists.
required_next_evidence: licensed PIT NBA play-by-play and materialized ModelOutputV1 rows
canonical game and condition and outcome assertions
completed full-day L2 reconstruction
same-time two-sided depth and PIT pause and venue-rule evidence

mlb.game_state_evidence: A 2025 Retrosheet reducer replay exists, but no registered probabilistic ModelOutputV1 series exists.
mlb.market_evidence: No canonical MLB game-condition mapping or same-time L2 bundle is materialized.
required_next_evidence: registered PIT MLB probabilistic output
